claimed_behaviour: Universal processing hub — largest ablation effect across all 12 task families

positive_effects.detail: L2 ablation causes KL 0.5-11.5 across all families; factual_recall most affected
L2 MLP ablation: major contributor to L2 effect
Factual direction at L2: 'rome' logprob 0.064->0.213 (3.3x) at s=+4.0

negative_effects.detail: L2 is NOT uniformly positional — effects concentrated at first+last tokens (mean 3.34/5.03), operators near-zero

training_delta_evidence.summary: L2 importance for json_schema unchanged (21.15->23.38, +2.2). But L2 decreased for copying (-0.75) after JSON LoRA.
L2 for json_schema stable from step 10 (23.37) through step 100 (23.38). Core circuit established early.

controls.result: Operator tokens have near-zero effect at L2 (mean -0.09)
L2 effect persists across all 5 family-specific adapters

steering.summary: Factual direction at L2 boosts target 3.3x. Negative steering suppresses. Oversteering at s>=+2 causes degeneration (Chinese chars).

adapter_evidence.summary: All 5 family adapters affect L2 importance. delimiter adapter eliminates L9/L22/L4 dependence, making L2 more dominant.

limitations: Tested on short synthetic prompts only. Ablation is zero-ablation (not mean/resample). Steering tested on factual recall only.
repro_command: python scripts/run_layer_ablation.py && python scripts/run_steering_sweep.py && python scripts/run_position_ablation.py

claimed_behaviour: Second-strongest ablation target across all families; absorbs JSON skill after LoRA training

positive_effects.detail: L0 MLP second-strongest across all families
L0 MLP importance for JSON: 10.85->13.84 (+2.99) after LoRA training

training_delta_evidence.summary: L0 MLP absorbs JSON skill: +2.99 KL delta
L0 MLP peaks at r=4 (15.77), declines at higher rank
o_proj-only LoRA achieves +3.64 L0 effect with only 344K params

limitations: JSON-specific training only. Other skill families concentrate elsewhere (dataset_shard_ablation).

claimed_behaviour: Final token prediction layer — almost exclusively affects last-position tokens

positive_effects.detail: Mean last-position effect 14.55 nats. All other positions ~0.
L22 second-strongest layer for delimiter_tracking in base model

limitations: Position-specific ablation only tested on base model, not on adapted models.

claimed_behaviour: Instruction-sensitive layer — highest first-position effect among mid-layers, strong delimiter tracking

positive_effects.detail: L9 strongest layer for delimiter_tracking in base model

limitations: Position analysis on short prompts only.

claimed_behaviour: Strongest individual attention head across multiple families

positive_effects.detail: L12 H8 strongest head across 5 families

limitations: Head ablation only. No patching or steering on individual heads.

claimed_behaviour: Appears as universal skill injection point — positive delta across 3+ family adapters

positive_effects.detail: L1 positive delta for factual_recall adapter (+6.51 on factual tasks)
L1 positive delta for code_semantics adapter (+4.70 on json tasks)
L1 positive delta for json_schema adapter (+3.00 on delimiter tasks)

limitations: Correlational — L1 delta appears but causal mechanism unknown. Could be adapter weight injection, not functional routing.

claimed_behaviour: Each skill concentrates in different layers after LoRA training — no universal pattern

positive_effects.detail: factual_recall: L3/16/19. code: L1/10/21. json: L6/12/13. delimiter: fully absorbed. copying: dispersed.

negative_effects.detail: H002 (universal L0-L2 concentration) REJECTED. Each skill has unique concentration pattern.

limitations: Only 5 families tested. Only r=8 adapters. Only 100 training steps.

claimed_behaviour: Adapter weight norms peak at L20-L23 but ablation effects peak at L0-L2

positive_effects.detail: Rank sweep: norms peak L22/L23. Ablation effects peak L0/L2. Spatial separation.

limitations: Norm analysis doesn't prove causal direction. Could be that late layers carry more parameters but early layers do the processing.

claimed_behaviour: factual_recall + json_schema adapters stack cleanly with positive synergy

positive_effects.detail: factual+json: +2.35 synergy on factual, +1.17 on json, <0.3 interference elsewhere

limitations: Only weighted merge (0.5/0.5) tested. No sweep of merge weights.

claimed_behaviour: delimiter_tracking adapter is destructive when combined with other adapters

negative_effects.detail: delimiter+code: -15.51 nats on delimiter task. Consistent across all pairs.

limitations: May be an artifact of the delimiter task evaluation (target token is single char, model generates multi-char completions).

claimed_behaviour: Core component structure for JSON schema locks in by step 10 (first 10% of training)

positive_effects.detail: L2/L7/L9 for json_schema: step10=23.37/21.62/19.00, step100=23.38/21.75/18.88. <1% drift after step 10.

limitations: Only JSON schema family tested. Only 100 training steps. Different families might establish later.
